arabic text:
اللّهُمَّ لَكَ صُمْناَ وَ عَلى رِزْقِكَ اَفْطَرْناَ​ فَتَقَبَّلْ مِناَّ اِنَّكَ اَنْتَ الْسَّمِيْعٌ الْعَلِيْم​
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ​يَا وَاسِعَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ اِغْفِرْلِىْ​
english translation text:
Dua for Iftaar
Oh Allah! For you do we fast, and with the sustenance provided by You do we end our fast. So bless us with acceptance. Indeed You are the All Hearing and All Knowledgeable.​
It is advisable to say the following at the first bite of food with which the fasting is broken:
In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful,​O Most Forgiving, pardon me my sins.​
